features: FRAGRANCE TO CREATE A WELCOMING ATMOSPHERE: Bring your home to life with the delightful scent of fresh magnolia & cherry blossom.

LONG LASTING FRAGRANCE INFUSED WITH ESSENTIAL OILS: Airwick Gels last up to 55 days, surround yourself in the inviting scents of our nature-inspired fragrances, infused with natural essential oils which neutralise malodours in bathroom and living room.
ELEGANT & DISCREET DESIGN: Discreet, glass design means Airwick Gels are easy to pop on your bathroom counter to neutralise odours.

NO BATTERY REQUIRED: Remove outer cover, unscrew cap from the glass container and remove it. Replace ouer cover. When product is at the end of use, dtach plastic dome from glass and discard both in recycling.
FREE FROM PHTALATES. Available in other fragrances
description: Product Description Freshen your home with Air Wick Gel Fresheners for a long lasting fragrance experience. Perfect for removing bad kitchen, bathroom and even pet odours. Air Freshener Ingredients Contains linalool, limonene and 2,4-dimethyl-3-cyclohexene carboxaldehyde
